zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert De Aston III於1389年出生在英國英格蘭爾艾希頓時，他的父親Richard Aston37歲，母親Ellen Dutton33歲。他於1409年與Isabel Beeston在英國爾盧可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1447年在英國英格蘭爾阿斯頓 白 塞頓享年58歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾薩爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert De Aston III于1389年出生在英国英格兰爾艾希頓时，他的父亲Richard Aston37岁，母亲Ellen Dutton33岁。他于1409年与Isabel Beeston在英国爾盧可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1447年在英国英格兰爾阿斯頓 白 塞頓享年58岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾薩爾。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Aston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Ad(e)stan, which is usually from Old English Æthelstān (see Alston ). It may also be from the much rarer Old English name Ēadstān.
habitational name from any of several places in England called Aston. Most were named with Old English ēast ‘east’ + tūn ‘settlement’. In a few cases the first element is æsc ‘ash tree’.

variants.name: Alston
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Alstan, which is a coalescence of several different Old English personal names: Æthelstān ‘noble stone’, Ælfstān ‘elf stone’, Ealdstān ‘old stone’, or Ealhstān ‘temple stone’.

habitational name from any of various places called Alston (in Cumbria, Lancashire, Devon, and Somerset) or Alstone (in Gloucestershire and Staffordshire). With the exception of Alston in Cumbria, which is formed with the Old Norse personal name Halfdan, these placenames all consist of an Old English personal name + Old English tūn ‘settlement’, for example Ælfsige in the case of Alstone in Gloucestershire.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert De Aston III was born in 1389, in Ashton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Aston, was 37 and his mother, Ellen Dutton, was 33. He married Isabel Beeston in 1409, in Runcorn, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1447, in Aston by Sutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58, and was buried in Tixall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert De Aston III est né en 1389, à Ashton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Aston, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Ellen Dutton, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Beeston en 1409, à Runcorn, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1447, à Aston by Sutton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Tixall, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er starb 1447 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Aston by Sutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Tixall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert De Aston III(이)가 1389년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 애슈턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Aston(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen Dutton(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1409년 영국 체실르 런코른에서 Isabel Beeston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1447년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 애스턴 비 수턴에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 티스알에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert De Aston III родился в 1389 г. в местности аштон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Aston было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen Dutton, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Beeston в 1409 г. в местности рункорн, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1447 г. в местности астон би суттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности тиксалл, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
